answer:
The longer piece must be at least 6 meters to form a square with area greater than 4, since a square of area 4 has side length 2 and perimeter 8. The cut point must be within 2 meters of either end to make the longer piece less than 8 meters, so the favorable length is 4 meters out of 12. Thus the probability is 4/12 = 1/3.

\boxed{D}
